security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http: ws: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' http: ws: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
